query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.openId, u.loginMethod, u.role, u.isPremium,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as track_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tracks t ON t.userId = u.id
GROUP BY u.id
ORDER BY u.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.root --database frNnwU2pwLKJifDR8KqR7c --execute

  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as track_count
